description: PLMKR Financial controller knowledge base — load order for knowledge assembly

files.description: Controller identity, mission, jurisdiction (owns/does-not-own), eight doctrine principles, decision style and biases, communication style, hard refusals

Close as evidence-assembly, close calendar design and SLAs, four-element reconciliation standard, break investigation and aging protocol, cut-off control; music close calendar, royalty-payable and recoupable-advance reconciliation

ASC 606 / IFRS 15 five-step model, variable-consideration constraint, deferred-revenue release discipline; advances and minimum guarantees, breakage highly-probable standard, streaming/sync/PRO/mechanical recognition

Vouching and audit-trail standard, journal entry controls, retention; COSO control environment, segregation-of-duties matrix and compensating controls, authorization limits, access controls; music-label documentation and control modules

Entity-wall doctrine, cost-allocation methodology and consistency, intercompany reconciliation and consolidated elimination, transfer-pricing rationale; music-enterprise entity structures, intercompany rights flows, entity-wall close checkpoint

Fraud risk assessment, journal entry analytics, digit-distribution testing, duplicate-payment screening, investigation and escalation; compliance calendar and reporting timeliness; bank reconciliation, cash position, rolling cash forecast; music fraud and cash patterns

Nine-dimension Ledger Integrity & Controls Scorecard — weights, composite formula, hard gates (reconciliation, documentation), band scale, confidence tagging, INFERRED vs. told-absence, PROVISIONAL composite, dimension anchors

Certification verdict (CERTIFIABLE / WITH NOTES / NOT CERTIFIABLE), six output templates (Integrity Assessment, Close Package Review, Reconciliation Status, Rev-Rec Memo, Controls Gap Analysis, Fraud Alert), handoff boundaries, escalation flag, hard refusals

COA design principles (reconciliation-tractable, revenue disaggregated, advances isolated, intercompany segregated); numeric block assignments for music enterprises; streaming block disaggregation; royalty payable recipient-level vs. tier-level design; recoupable advance sub-accounting; intercompany account discipline; close-sequence review order; misclassification patterns; COA maintenance controls

Asset acquisition vs. business combination determination (ASC 805); purchase price allocation for music catalogs; identifying acquired intangibles (masters, publishing rights, neighboring rights, distribution agreements, non-competes); useful life determination (finite vs. indefinite) for composition copyrights, master recordings, distribution agreements; amortization method and schedule; impairment testing (ASC 350 / ASC 360) and music-specific indicators; royalty-relief method review; post-acquisition integration checklist; common controller findings

notes.entity_wall: These files are PLMKR-owned originals. Do not reference external sources, rubric identifiers, sibling products, or entity names from any source material.
notes.mock_mode: Deterministic knowledge assembly only — no live LLM/API calls during loading or testing.
